markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 392. Highway Beautification on State Highway Right-of-way
##### § 392.004 — Regionally Appropriate Landscaping

The department shall establish guidelines for a beautification project on a state highway right-of-way that require the use of only regionally appropriate plants.

*Added by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 939 (H.B.3302), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2015.*
